    4536993BODY MASS INDEX~kg/m2
    4688719CENTRAL VENOUS PRESSURE~cm[H2O]
    4688720CIRCUMFERENCE/GIRTH~[in_i]
    4688721FETAL HEART TONES
    4688722FUNDAL HEIGHT
    4688723HEARING
    4688724HEIGHT~[in_i]
    4500635PAIN
    4500636PULSE~/min
    4500637PULSE OXIMETRY~%
    4688725RESPIRATION~/min
    4500638TEMPERATURE~[degF]
    4688726TONOMETRY
    4688727VISION CORRECTED
    4688728VISION UNCORRECTED
    4500639WEIGHT~[lb_av]
"},"url":"http://va.gov/fhir/ValueSet/VitalsUnits-vista","version":"1.1.494","name":"VitalsUnits_VistA","title":"VitalsUnits VistA","status":"active","experimental":false,"date":"2025-01-25T09:28:03+00:00","publisher":"VA","contact":[{"name":"VA","telecom":[{"system":"url","value":"https://www.va.gov"}]}],"description":"VistA Source ValueSet for Terminology Maps VF_VitalsUnits","jurisdiction":[{"coding":[{"system":"urn:iso:std:iso:3166","code":"US","display":"United States of America"}]}],"compose":{"include":[{"system":"http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/VHA","concept":[{"code":"4688718","display":"AUDIOMETRY"},{"code":"4500634","display":"BLOOD PRESSURE"},{"code":"4536993","display":"BODY MASS INDEX"},{"code":"4688719","display":"CENTRAL VENOUS PRESSURE"},{"code":"4688720","display":"CIRCUMFERENCE/GIRTH"},{"code":"4688721","display":"FETAL HEART TONES"},{"code":"4688722","display":"FUNDAL HEIGHT"},{"code":"4688723","display":"HEARING"},{"code":"4688724","display":"HEIGHT"},{"code":"4500635","display":"PAIN"},{"code":"4500636","display":"PULSE"},{"code":"4500637","display":"PULSE OXIMETRY"},{"code":"4688725","display":"RESPIRATION"},{"code":"4500638","display":"TEMPERATURE"},{"code":"4688726","display":"TONOMETRY"},{"code":"4688727","display":"VISION CORRECTED"},{"code":"4688728","display":"VISION UNCORRECTED"},{"code":"4500639","display":"WEIGHT"}]}]}}},{"name":"system-version","valueUri":"http://snomed.info/sct|http://snomed.info/sct/731000124108"},{"name":"displayLanguage","valueString":"en, en-US"},{"name":"default-to-latest-version","valueBoolean":true}]},"request":{"method":"POST","url":"ValueSet/$validate-code"}}]}
